assumptions: PRELIMINARY ESTIMATE — subject to revision after site documents and program confirmation.

Cost per sqm: MXN 22,000 — above midpoint of standalone_residential range (MXN 18,000–25,000) due to coastal site premium: salt-air resistant materials, wind-rated glazing, structural uplift requirements, and coastal construction logistics in BCS.
Total sqm: 356 sqm (all programmed spaces including covered terrace and pool deck — these require full structural design due to coastal wind exposure).
Base construction cost: 356 sqm × MXN 22,000 = MXN 7,832,000.
Architecture fee: 12% of base = MXN 939,840 (note: contracted USD fee of $90,000 in seed data takes precedence in contract — this is for internal review alignment only).
Total estimate: MXN 9,907,480 (~USD 550,000–600,000 at current exchange rates) — within client's stated budget range of USD 600,000–900,000.
Pool and solar costs not included in base sqm rate — pool structure and solar system to be quantified separately in engineering phase.
Interior design and landscape coordination are referral services — not included in construction budget.
